data.body: POST-CLOSE FIX (test-quality pass, commit 813dd5c8): a new test surfaced a regression introduced when 8d8e moved with-resolution under the concurrency guard — a with-expression resolution error (e.g. a DECLARED input not supplied at run time) escaped run_workflow as an exception instead of failing the step. interpreter._run_leaf now catches ExpressionError from _resolve_scoped and turns it into a failed StepResult (v1 contract restored). Added interpreter behavioral coverage: malformed/empty map.over, unknown uses, declared-input-not-supplied, the if: skip-guard (skipped marker + effect not run), RunResult.terminal_step/output, while-vs-until (pre-check vs do-while), runtime map.index_var. Added store-backed persistence tests: branch + map iteration-keyed markers via show_ticket, and a partial-resume (crash mid-loop -> resume re-runs only the failed iteration). All green.
